title: Visual Handoff
description: Per-shot record of the Blender-previs-to-photoreal-storyboard handoff. Written by workspace/scripts/build-visual-handoff.py, lives at workspace/projects/<project_id>/shots/<shot_id>/visual-handoff.json.

blender_role.description: Always composition_only. Blender is never visual truth for high-brand/photoreal work.

storyboard_prompt_path.description: Path to the generated GPT-Image-from-Blender-previs prompt for this shot.

storyboard_image_path.description: Path to the generated photoreal storyboard/key-visual image, once it exists.

seedance_primary_image_allowed.description: True only once storyboard_status=approved and an asset-manifest for storyboard_image_path has seedance_input_allowed=true.

block_reason.description: Human-readable reason generation is currently blocked, if applicable.
